description: No action needed — customer registered their domain through Cloudflare Registrar; zone is born active so no nameserver swap

expected.subject: lucaslux.co.uk — nothing for you to do
expected.body:
Hi Lucas,

Quick heads up — your domain lucaslux.co.uk is already on
Cloudflare, so there are no nameserver changes for you to
make. Nice and easy.

We'll wire it up to your new site on our side and email you
again as soon as it goes live.

— ModuForge
